(generic) H4: Search (unrelated) ================================================== AFTER OPTIMIZED STRUCTURE ================================================== H1: Outdoor Banner Frame Kit with Custom 33" x 46" Banners for Events & Trade Shows H2: Durable Aluminum Frame with Weather-Resistant Vinyl Banner Customization H2: Outdoor Banner Frame Kit for Portable Display & Event Marketing H2: Banner Frame Material for Outdoor Event & Trade Show Use H2: Custom Banner Finishing Options for Outdoor Frame Installation H2: Banner Frame Production & Delivery Turnaround Times H2: Payment Options for Custom Banner Frame Orders H2: Shipping Guidelines for Banner Frame & Custom Banner Delivery H2: Professional Artwork Services for Custom Banner Printing H2: Order Your Custom Banner Frame Kit Today ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW # Outdoor Banner Frame Kit with Custom 33" x 46" Banners for Events & Trade Shows ## Durable Aluminum Frame with Weather-Resistant Vinyl Banner Customization PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Material Choice: Custom Banner Material for Outdoor Frame Display Product Configuration: Banner Frame Kit with Custom Vinyl Banners Quantity Selection: Number of Banner Frame Kits Needed Size Specifications: 33" x 46" Standard Event Banner Size PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Outdoor Banner Frame Kit for Portable Display & Event Marketing

The Outdoor Banner Frame - Small is designed to hold one or two custom banners for events, trade shows, and outdoor marketing displays. The lightweight aluminum frame assembles quickly without tools and includes all necessary hardware for professional presentation.

Each kit includes a durable aluminum frame, weather-resistant bungee cords for secure banner attachment, ground stakes for outdoor stability, and a convenient nylon carrying case for transport and storage.

Your banner frame kit comes complete with one or two full-color 33" x 46" vinyl banners printed with your custom design. The banners are printed on weather-resistant 13 oz vinyl material suitable for both indoor and outdoor display applications.

Perfect for trade shows, outdoor events, construction sites, real estate marketing, retail promotions, and temporary advertising displays. The portable design allows for easy setup and breakdown at multiple locations.

Frame dimensions accommodate standard 33" x 46" banners with grommets for secure attachment. The aluminum construction provides durability while remaining lightweight for easy transport between events and locations.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Frame Material for Outdoor Event & Trade Show Use

Our custom banners for outdoor banner frames are printed on premium 13 oz vinyl material, specifically chosen for its durability and weather resistance in both indoor and outdoor display environments.

This heavy-duty vinyl material provides excellent print quality while withstanding outdoor conditions including wind, rain, and UV exposure. The material's weight and thickness ensure your banners maintain their professional appearance throughout extended display periods.

The 13 oz vinyl is rated for both indoor and outdoor applications, making it ideal for trade show displays, outdoor events, construction signage, and retail marketing where banners may be exposed to various weather conditions.

Please note that vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and slight size variations may occur due to heat application during printing and finishing processes, as well as climate conditions. Our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot to accommodate material characteristics.

For applications requiring precise measurements, please discuss your specific display requirements with our customer service team to ensure optimal results for your banner frame installation.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Banner Finishing Options for Outdoor Frame Installation

All banners for outdoor banner frames include professional finishing with reinforced grommets for secure attachment to the aluminum frame system. The grommets are strategically placed to align with the frame's bungee cord attachment points.

Reinforced edges provide additional durability for banners that will be repeatedly installed and removed from banner frames during multiple events or display changes.

The finishing process includes hemming around all edges to prevent fraying and extend banner life during outdoor display conditions and frequent handling.

Bungee cord attachment system allows for secure banner installation while accommodating slight material movement in outdoor wind conditions, preventing stress on the banner material.

Professional heat-welded seams ensure long-lasting durability for banners used in outdoor banner frame displays where weather resistance is essential.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Frame Production & Delivery Turnaround Times

We offer flexible production schedules for your custom banner frame orders, with options ranging from express 2-day production to economical 5-day turnaround times.

2 Business Days Express Production

Express production is ideal when you need your banner frame kit quickly for upcoming events or trade shows. Orders approved before 5:00 PM CST enter production the following business day.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular production option provides fast turnaround for most custom banner frame orders while maintaining competitive pricing for event marketing needs.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Economy production timeline offers cost savings for banner frame orders when extended lead time is available for your event or marketing campaign.

Production time begins when artwork files are approved and complete. Orders requiring proofs or artwork revisions will enter production upon final approval.

Emergency same-day production may be available for urgent banner frame needs. Contact customer service to discuss rush production options for your specific timeline requirements.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Options for Custom Banner Frame Orders

All custom banner frame kits must be paid in full before entering production to ensure timely processing of your order.

We accept all major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for immediate order processing and production scheduling.

Check payments are accepted and must be received and cleared before your banner frame order enters production. This payment method may extend your overall delivery timeline.

Your credit card will not be charged until you have reviewed and approved your banner frame order details, including artwork, specifications, and delivery requirements.

For large banner frame orders or ongoing event marketing needs, contact our customer service team to discuss payment terms and volume pricing options.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Banner Frame & Custom Banner Delivery

Banner frame kits ship via UPS Ground unless expedited shipping is requested for urgent event deadlines. You will receive tracking information once your order ships.

Shipping costs are calculated based on package weight and destination. Additional charges may apply for oversized banner frame orders or expedited delivery requirements.

International banner frame shipments require customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation. We accept international labels from USPS and UPS for overseas delivery.

Available Shipping Methods

  • Economy Shipping: 5-10 business days for cost-effective delivery
  • Standard Ground: 3-5 business days via UPS Ground
  • Three Day Select: 3 business days for faster delivery
  • Two Day Express: 2 business days for urgent orders
  • Overnight Express: Next business day delivery available

Damaged packages must be reported immediately and returned for replacement processing. Lost packages require shipping company confirmation before replacement orders are processed.

For questions about banner frame shipping to your location or expedited delivery options for upcoming events, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Event & Trade Show Applications for Outdoor Banner Frame Displays

Outdoor banner frame kits are ideal for trade shows, providing professional portable displays that set up quickly in booth spaces and exhibition halls.

Perfect for outdoor events including festivals, farmers markets, craft fairs, and community gatherings where portable signage needs to withstand outdoor conditions.

Construction companies use banner frames for temporary job site signage, safety messaging, and project information displays that can be easily relocated as work progresses.

Real estate professionals utilize banner frames for open house signage, development marketing, and property promotional displays that transport easily between locations.

Retail businesses employ banner frames for sidewalk advertising, sale promotions, and special event marketing where eye-catching displays drive foot traffic.

Sports teams and organizations use banner frames for team spirit displays, tournament signage, and event promotion at outdoor sporting venues.

The portable design with carrying case makes banner frames perfect for businesses attending multiple events, trade shows, or marketing locations throughout the year.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Artwork Services for Custom Banner Printing

Vector-based artwork files produce the highest quality results for banner frame displays. Adobe Illustrator (.ai) and Encapsulated PostScript (.eps) files with outlined fonts are preferred for crisp, professional printing.

High-resolution PDF and JPEG files are acceptable when created at 300 DPI or higher resolution to ensure sharp text and graphics on your custom banners.

Our professional graphic design team can create custom artwork for your banner frame displays or enhance existing logos and designs for optimal printing results.

Artwork Proofing Options

Order proofs allow you to review artwork, verify order details, pricing, and shipping information before production begins. Proofs must be approved before your banner frame order enters production.

Color Match Proof System is recommended for projects requiring precise color matching. This service ensures accurate color reproduction for brand-critical displays and corporate events.

File Upload Requirements

Upload print-ready files up to 60 MB through our online system. For larger artwork files, contact customer service for alternative file transfer instructions.

Professional design services are available if you need custom artwork created for your banner frame displays. Our designers will provide a proof for approval before production begins.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Your Custom Banner Frame Kit Today

Ready to create professional portable displays for your next event, trade show, or marketing campaign? Our outdoor banner frame kits provide everything you need for impactful visual marketing.

Each kit includes a durable aluminum frame, weather-resistant hardware, and one or two custom-printed vinyl banners designed specifically for your business or event needs.

Choose from our extensive template library, upload your own artwork, or work with our professional design team to create eye-catching banners that drive results at any location.

With production options from 2 to 5 business days and nationwide shipping, you can have your custom banner frame kit ready for upcoming events and marketing opportunities.

Questions about banner frame specifications, artwork requirements, or shipping to your location? Our customer service team is ready to help you create the perfect portable display solution.

Call (320) 391-5300 or customize your banner frame kit online now.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Frame Kit Frequently Asked Questions

What's included with the outdoor banner frame kit?

Each kit includes a lightweight aluminum frame, bungee cords for banner attachment, ground stakes for outdoor stability, a carrying case, and one or two custom-printed 33" x 46" vinyl banners.

How quickly can I get my banner frame kit?

Production times range from 2 to 5 business days depending on your timeline needs. Express 2-day production is available for urgent events and trade shows.

Can the banner frame be used indoors and outdoors?

Yes, the aluminum frame and weather-resistant vinyl banners are designed for both indoor trade shows and outdoor events, providing versatile display options.

How portable is the banner frame system?

The lightweight aluminum frame disassembles for easy transport in the included carrying case, making it perfect for businesses attending multiple events and trade shows.

What artwork formats work best for banner printing?

Vector files like .ai or .eps with outlined fonts produce the best results. High-resolution PDF and JPEG files at 300 DPI or higher also print well.

Are design services available if I need custom artwork?

Yes, our professional design team can create custom banners for your frame kit or enhance existing artwork for optimal printing results.

What banner material is used for outdoor frame displays?

Banners are printed on durable 13 oz vinyl material that withstands outdoor conditions while maintaining professional appearance for extended display periods.

Can I order replacement banners for my frame?

Absolutely. You can reorder banners with new designs for the same frame system, making it easy to update your messaging for different events or promotions.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
